title: Pillowy Turkish Iceberg Lettuce Kuru Fasulye
description: A romantic, umami-packed keto twist on traditional Turkish bean stew, served in crisp iceberg lettuce cups for a pillowy, low-carb experience.
instructions: Rinse and separate iceberg lettuce leaves, set aside.
Drain soaked black beans and transfer to a saucepan.
Heat olive oil over medium heat, sauté onion and garlic until translucent.
Stir in tomato paste, paprika, cumin, and oregano, cooking for 2 minutes until fragrant.
Add beans and vegetable broth, bring to a simmer, cover, and let bubble for 40 minutes, stirring occasionally.
After beans reach a soft, creamy consistency, season with salt, pepper, and lemon juice.
Fold in butter until melted and the sauce thickens to a bhuna-like depth.
Spoon the warm bean mixture into iceberg lettuce cups, ensuring each leaf is generously filled.
Garnish with chopped parsley, serve immediately, and enjoy the romantic Turkish flare.
